entries.statement: Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs) for new data processing activities and AI systems.
Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions to produce records of processing activities (RoPA) in compliance with regulatory requirements.

Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.

Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, and other cross-border data transfer mechanisms, ensuring compliance with applicable jurisdictional requirements and supervisory guidance.

Skill in designing and implementing data anonymization and pseudonymization techniques appropriate to the intended use, including k-anonymity, differential privacy, and synthetic data generation approaches.
Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data flows, access patterns, and retention practices against privacy requirements and privacy-by-design principles.

Skill in designing data classification frameworks and implementing classification controls that enforce handling, access, and retention requirements based on data sensitivity and regulatory classification.
Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
Skill in identifying and researching software vulnerabilities, conducting vulnerability assessments, and evaluating operational capabilities against known attack vectors and exploits.
Skill in conducting threat analysis and developing threat models for systems and applications, including threat factor analysis, threat environment characterization, and threat-based test planning.
Skill in designing and evaluating secure network and system architectures, including architecture analysis, secure network design, and evaluation of security designs against threat models.

Skill in designing and executing security-focused test protocols for AI systems, including selection of appropriate testing methodologies, definition of security test scenarios, and documentation of security test evidence.
Skill in designing AI training data governance and quality assurance, including data provenance tracking, design choice documentation, representativeness evaluation, and data preparation security.
Skill in designing and implementing AI system transparency and interpretability mechanisms that enable users and security personnel to understand system decision-making and oversight.
Skill in implementing secure data handling practices, including secure application development, encrypted communications, and secure deployment of data systems and services.
Skill in designing privacy impact assessments and privacy policy documentation, including privacy disclosure statements, consent forms, and privacy notice creation for data processing activities.
Skill in conducting privacy compliance monitoring and privacy vendor assessment, including evaluation of organizational privacy practices and compliance with privacy policies and procedures.
Skill in implementing continuous security monitoring of AI systems in production, including observability for security events, detection of anomalies, and identification of security control failures.
Skill in identifying, documenting, and evaluating the effectiveness of internal security controls for AI system components, including assessment of control design and implementation.
Skill in designing AI monitoring and logging systems that capture security-relevant events and support forensic analysis, incident investigation, and continuous security oversight.
Skill in implementing AI-generated content provenance marking systems and synthetic content identification using machine-readable format standards for authenticity tracking.
Skill in assessing and classifying AI system security and privacy risk levels, including evaluation of high-risk criteria and determination of appropriate security control intensity.
Skill in assessing security and privacy impact of substantial modifications to AI systems, including modification scope determination and requirement assessment for re-evaluation.
Skill in designing human-machine interfaces for AI system security oversight, including design of effective oversight mechanisms and interface usability for security monitoring.
Skill in creating comprehensive technical documentation for AI systems that demonstrates security and privacy compliance, including architecture, design decisions, and security controls.
Skill in creating downstream integration documentation for general-purpose AI models, including capability and limitation disclosure, security constraints, and usage guidance.
